mapper.select: select id from jsh_freight_head where bill_no = #{billNo} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1' limit 1
mapper.update:
update jsh_freight_head set payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, paid_amount = case when #{paymentStatus} = '1' then total_freight else #{paidAmount} end, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_operator = #{paymentOperator} where delete_flag = '0' and status = '1' and id in
#{id}

update jsh_freight_head set payment_status = '0', paid_amount = 0, payment_time = null, payment_operator = null where delete_flag = '0' and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select max(bill_no) from jsh_freight_head where bill_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%') and delete_flag = '0' and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
